title: Dry Charred Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A charred, tender, and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring lamb, gochugaru, and a blend of spices, cooked to perfection in a papillote, perfect for meal prep and raw-friendly diets
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together gochugaru, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over high heat
Sear the lamb pieces until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and cook for 20 minutes
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and cover with a papillote
Return the Dutch oven to the oven and cook for an additional 10 minutes
Remove the papillote and let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before serving
